name: commonality
description: Commonality - Coordinated crowdfunding with composable delegation

scripts.deploy-local: cd hardhat && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy-local.js --network localhost
scripts.integration-tests: cd hardhat && npx hardhat run run-integration-tests.js
scripts.integration-tests:scenarios: cd hardhat && npx hardhat run run-integration-tests.js
scripts.integration-tests:generative: cd hardhat && npx hardhat run run-integration-tests-generative.js
scripts.integration-tests:generative:small: cd hardhat && npx hardhat run run-integration-tests-generative.js -- 10 3
scripts.integration-tests:generative:medium: cd hardhat && npx hardhat run run-integration-tests-generative.js -- 30 5
scripts.integration-tests:generative:large: cd hardhat && npx hardhat run run-integration-tests-generative.js -- 50 10
